case_title: MARTIN GAEHWILER SR VS. COURTNEY COPELAND et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT COPELAND, COURTNEY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAEHWILER SR, MARTIN TRUSTEE OF THE GAEHWILER 2000 TRUST AND MARTIN GAEHWILER JUNIOR AS TO DEFENDANT COPELAND, COURTNEY ALL UNKNOWN PERSONS CLAIMING A RIGHT TO POSSESSION DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT COPELAND, COURTNEY

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON AUG-06-2014 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT COURTNEY COPELAND'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
